properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5 v5 v6 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I came, In darkness, I came Illuminating all in glory Gave birth to our story I breathed, mankind was conceived From out of the earth birthed My passion My great satisfaction

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Enslaved My children as slaves In sadness and pain As I watched, your identity lost As sin, it stole its way in And robed me of My greatest passion The ones I have fashioned to reign

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take on My dear There's no need to fear My love's not divided When it comes to you Take on My love My blood is enough I'm not undecided When it comes to you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I came A sacrifice came as love offering On that cross Replaced all that was lost Now death, oh where is your sting? Humanity's heart is now beating My kingdom defeating the grave

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your love has chosen the cross Your life gave hope to the lost With every breath Singing how I love You Freedom restored in Your name My soul is anchored again With every breath Singing how I love You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You hold the keys to the grave You have the power to save With every breath Singing how I love You Freedom restored in Your name My soul is anchored again With every breath Singing how I love You
